content: [sanitize-util] Create routes/sanitize.py with centralized sanitization functions (HTML strip, normalize)
[sanitize-input] Apply sanitization to user-generated fields at storage layer (videos, auth, matches, chat, reports)
[email-xss] HTML-escape user content interpolated into email templates (email_utils.py, sponsors.py)
[upload-hardening] Tighten media MIME validation — reject octet-stream, add nosniff to video responses
[build-test] Verify frontend build + run security tests
